This is a test file for koneko.

It contains some text that can be used for testing search functionality.
For example, you can search for the word "search" or "test".

Here are some more lines:

- Line with the word apple
- Line with the word banana
- Line with the word cherry
- This line mentions search again
- And another test line here

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris.

Some repeated words for testing:
test test test
search search search
find find find
